# Prompt Architect

> Professional AI prompt generator that transforms goals into expert-level structured prompts.

## About

Prompt Architect is a web-based tool that generates precision-crafted prompts for AI models including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Llama. Users describe their goal in plain language, configure options (task type, industry, tone, output format), and receive an expert-level prompt with deep domain expertise, structured methodology, and professional formatting built in.

## Features

- 15 task types: strategy, analysis, coding, writing, brainstorming, debugging, review, decision-making, persuasion, and more
- 15 industries with deep context injection: finance, tech, healthcare, legal, consulting, marketing, education, e-commerce, real estate, media, HR, manufacturing, government, research
- Smart Enhancement Engine: auto-detects vague input and enriches with audience, scope, and techniques
- Professional file output formatting: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Markdown, HTML, JSON, CSV
- Industry-standard typography and color palettes based on top firms (Goldman Sachs, McKinsey, CBRE, etc.)
- Model-specific prompt formatting: XML tags for Claude, markdown for ChatGPT, bold for Gemini
- 15 advanced techniques: chain of thought, red team analysis, first principles, systems thinking
- Firm and role selector with 14 sectors, 70 firms, and 350 roles
- Two modes: Simple (quick prompts) and Expert (full configuration)

## URL

https://www.proarch.tech

## Pricing

- Free: Limited prompts (2 simple + 1 expert)
- Pro Monthly: $9/month
- Pro Annual: $72/year ($6/month)
